item.title: About Me
item.description: I am Soheil Sadeghi . I was born in 1989 . I studied computer software and I currently live in Tehran . I have loved creating since I was a child. As a kid I used to love making new things out of…

item.title: Giant The Shepherd
item.description: “Giant The Shepherd” It was a cool yet challenging project that i enjoyed a lot. hope you all enjoy it as we do 😎✨👊🏼

item.title: The year That passed, 2020
item.description: "The year That passed, 2020" Here is my vision about the year that passed. I named it "2020". Hope you guys enjoy and remember that "THIS TOO SHALL PASS!"
